summary: APP-239 implementation review allow: current-head review found no P0/P1 blockers; accepted P2 findings were fixed by adding BOSS live projection and non-none failure smoke coverage plus disabling non-read-only Library task launch CTAs. The App reads Core owner API refs with credentials omitted, displays evidence refs only, and keeps real accounts, profile/Cookie material, raw evidence, live site access, writes, PR merge, and issue closeout out of scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-07T06:14:19Z App checks passed: npm run typecheck; npm run smoke; git diff --check. Smoke covers XHS Core live projection, BOSS Core live projection, raw evidence boundary, non-none failure recovery, app_action none suppression, mixed run detail failure fallback, and read-only-only Library task launch CTA. Earlier Loom checks passed before the P2 smoke/UI repair and must be refreshed after commit: loom fact-chain --target . --json; loom build --target . --item APP-239 --build-evidence .loom/specs/APP-239/build-evidence.json --json; loom verify --target . --json; loom suite validate --target . --item APP-239 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item APP-239 --json; loom suite evidence validate --target . --item APP-239 --json. Review-readiness tool-surface attempts were recorded but did not pass due Loom source/install surface blockers: tools/skills_surface.py check returned docs-reference-sync drift in the global Loom source package; tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only returned source scope mismatch for the installed package. These are not App product, account, profile, or external-site failures.
